rules.name: 均线多头排列
rules.description: MA5 > MA10 > MA20，短期趋势向上
rules.condition: ma_alignment == 'bullish'

rules.name: 均线空头排列
rules.description: MA5 < MA10 < MA20，短期趋势向下
rules.condition: ma_alignment == 'bearish'

rules.name: MA5上穿MA20
rules.description: 短期均线上穿中期均线，金叉信号
rules.condition: ma5_prev is not None and ma20_prev is not None and ma5_prev < ma20_prev and ma5 >= ma20

rules.name: MA5下穿MA20
rules.description: 短期均线下穿中期均线，死叉信号
rules.condition: ma5_prev is not None and ma20_prev is not None and ma5_prev > ma20_prev and ma5 <= ma20

rules.name: MACD金叉
rules.description: DIF上穿DEA，短期动能转强
rules.condition: macd_cross == 'golden'

rules.name: MACD死叉
rules.description: DIF下穿DEA，短期动能转弱
rules.condition: macd_cross == 'death'

rules.name: RSI超买
rules.description: RSI超过70，短期涨幅过大，注意回调风险
rules.condition: rsi is not None and rsi > 70

rules.name: RSI超卖
rules.description: RSI低于30，短期跌幅过大，可能反弹
rules.condition: rsi is not None and rsi < 30

rules.name: 创20日新高
rules.description: 价格突破近20日最高点，上行动力强
rules.condition: new_high_20d == True

rules.name: 创20日新低
rules.description: 价格跌破近20日最低点，下行压力较大
rules.condition: new_low_20d == True

rules.name: 近5日上涨
rules.description: 近5日累计涨幅为正
rules.condition: return_5d is not None and return_5d > 0

rules.name: 近5日下跌
rules.description: 近5日累计跌幅为负
rules.condition: return_5d is not None and return_5d < 0

rules.name: 近20日上涨
rules.description: 近20日累计涨幅为正，中期趋势向好
rules.condition: return_20d is not None and return_20d > 3

rules.name: 近20日下跌
rules.description: 近20日累计跌幅超过3%，中期趋势偏弱
rules.condition: return_20d is not None and return_20d < -3

rules.name: 放量
rules.description: 成交量超过20日均值1.5倍，市场参与度提升
rules.condition: volume_ratio is not None and volume_ratio > 1.5

rules.name: 缩量
rules.description: 成交量低于20日均值0.5倍，市场观望情绪浓
rules.condition: volume_ratio is not None and volume_ratio < 0.5

rules.name: 主力净流入
rules.description: 主力资金当日净流入，机构看多
rules.condition: main_net_flow is not None and main_net_flow > 0

rules.name: 主力净流出
rules.description: 主力资金当日净流出，机构看空
rules.condition: main_net_flow is not None and main_net_flow < 0

rules.name: 溢价偏高
rules.description: 溢价率超过1.5%，买入成本高于净值，溢价回落风险
rules.condition: premium_rate is not None and premium_rate > 1.5

rules.name: 折价交易
rules.description: 溢价率为负（折价），买入价格低于净值
rules.condition: premium_rate is not None and premium_rate < -0.5

rules.name: 估值偏低
rules.description: PE百分位低于20%，处于历史低估值区间
rules.condition: pe_percentile is not None and pe_percentile < 20

rules.name: 估值偏高
rules.description: PE百分位高于80%，处于历史高估值区间
rules.condition: pe_percentile is not None and pe_percentile > 80

rules.name: 估值合理
rules.description: PE百分位在20%-80%之间，估值处于正常区间
rules.condition: pe_percentile is not None and 20 <= pe_percentile <= 80
